description: Manufactures semiconductor production equipment and measuring instruments. Products include wafer dicing machines, probing machines, polish grinders, chemical mechanical planarizers, and precision dicing blades.

_externalRelationships.notes: Competes with DISCO in dicing. DISCO 80% vs Tokyo Seimitsu 10% market share. Together they control 90% of global dicing market.

_metadata.notes: Q3 2026 revenue: 35.9B JPY, net income: 4.5B JPY. 52-week range: 6,148-16,170 JPY. Brand name: ACCRETECH.
